allow: Bash(cat constants.ts 2>/dev/null || cat constants/index.ts 2>/dev/null || find . -name "constants*" -type f | grep -v node_modules | head -5)
Bash(grep -r "style=" app components --include="*.tsx" --include="*.ts" 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | head -20)

Bash(grep -r "https:\\/\\/\\|mailto:" app components --include="*.tsx" --include="*.ts" 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -v "SITE_URL\\|SOCIAL_LINKS\\|CONTACT_DETAILS\\|RESUME_URL\\|\\.href\\|\\.whatsapp\\|\\.medium\\|\\.linkedin" | head -30)
Bash(grep -rn "interface\\|type.*Props\\|type.*{" app components --include="*.tsx" --include="*.ts" 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -v "React" | head -40)
Bash(grep -r "rel=\\"" app components --include="*.tsx" 2>/dev/null | grep -v "noopener noreferrer" | head -10)

Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('lucide-react'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('message'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('book'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('pen'\)\)\)" 2>/dev/null || echo "Checking lucide for Medium/WhatsApp alternatives...")
Bash(grep -r "import.*from 'fs'" constants/ --include="*.ts" && echo "FOUND fs import" || echo "No fs import - clean")

Bash(for f in app/\\\(main\\\)/about/page.tsx app/\\\(main\\\)/skills/page.tsx app/\\\(main\\\)/experience/page.tsx app/\\\(main\\\)/projects/page.tsx app/\\\(main\\\)/education/page.tsx app/\\\(main\\\)/contact/page.tsx)
Bash(echo "=== Check for unused public files ===" && ls public/ | while read f; do grep -rq "$f" app/ components/ constants/ 2>/dev/null && echo "USED: $f" || echo "UNUSED: $f"; done)
Bash(echo "=== Verify aria attributes ===" && grep -rn "aria-current\\|aria-label" components/ app/ --include="*.tsx" 2>/dev/null | head -20)
Bash(cd /tmp/pp && ls -la app/\\\(main\\\)/page.tsx && cat -v app/\\\(main\\\)/page.tsx | head -3)

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3099/about && echo "" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3099/skills && echo "" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3099/contact)
